# Sai Dutta Abhishek Dash — Full Stack Engineer & AI Specialist

## About
Sai Dutta Abhishek Dash is a Full Stack Engineer & AI Specialist based in Bhubaneswar, India. He builds production-ready applications at the intersection of full-stack engineering, AI/ML, and security. He has delivered 25 production-grade applications across architecture and systems, full-stack and security, AI and machine learning, Discord and dev tooling, design systems, and infrastructure utility.

## Expertise
- **Programming**: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, Java, Bash, Tailwind CSS
- **AI/ML**: TensorFlow, TensorFlow.js, scikit-learn, LangChain, Hugging Face, Mistral AI, Groq Whisper, OpenCV, NLP
- **DevOps & Cloud**: AWS (Certified), Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Vercel, Linux
- **Security**: Cryptography (X25519 ECDH, ChaCha20-Poly1305), Zero-knowledge encryption, Web Crypto API, DDoS protection, IP tables

## Notable Projects
- **MarkItDownJS** — AST-first document-to-markdown engine, 20 packages, Turborepo monorepo (github.com/instax-dutta/MarkItDownJS)
- **PraharShield** — Minecraft Velocity anti-bot, handles 100k JPS on 1GB RAM (github.com/instax-dutta/PraharShield)
- **CL-Chat Reborn** — P2P encrypted CLI chat, ECDH + ChaCha20-Poly1305, 81 tests (github.com/instax-dutta/cl-chat-reborn)
- **Tooner** — Privacy-first document tokenization for LLMs (tooner.sdad.pro)
- **Binify** — Zero-knowledge encrypted pastebin (bin.sdad.pro)
- **Sensory** — Scalable cloud storage with Backblaze B2 (mirror.sdad.pro)
- **AiScribe** — AI audio transcription with Groq Whisper (ais.sdad.pro)
- **WordAI** — AI SEO content generation (wordai.sdad.pro)
- **OneShotAI** — Prompt engineering tool (osai.sdad.pro)
- **GenieLabs** — AI-powered development platform (genielabs.sdad.pro)
- **Discactyl** — Pterodactyl panel Discord controller (github.com/instax-dutta/discactyl)
- **Auralyn** — Discord music bot with Lavalink (auralyn.sdad.pro)
- **VeronicaBot** — YouTube/Twitch Discord notifications (github.com/instax-dutta/VeronicaBot)
- **AMZRelay** — Amazon non-returnable products finder (Discord bot)
- **Elipso Theme** — Vercel-inspired Pterodactyl theme
- **Elden Theme** — Sentri-inspired Pterodactyl theme
- **Elysium** — Terminal-native Pterodactyl theme
- **PacketBuddy** — Network usage tracker
- **MaxArchiver** — FFmpeg video compression automation
- **Ultimate-Firewall** — Enterprise DDoS protection
- **SecPassGen** — Secure password generator (passwords.sdad.pro)

## Credentials
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (2024)
- Amazon Bedrock Getting Started — AWS (2024)
- Amazon Q Developer — AWS (2024)
- Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science — GIET University Gunupur (2025)
